user.title: Football Match Tracker

custom_league.title: Custom League
custom_league.description:
Enter a league shortcut and season.

Common shortcuts: bl1 (Bundesliga), epl (Premier League), wm26 (World Cup 2026), em (Euro 2024), CA2024 (Copa America 2024)

error.league_not_found: League not found. Check the shortcut and season.
error.cannot_fetch_teams: Could not fetch teams for this league.
